summary: High‑energy show highlighted by a standout “Good Lovin’” with an unspecified but listenable source
review: The lone fan review rates the recording five stars, celebrating the performance (especially “Good Lovin’”) while lamenting Brent’s passing. No concrete details about the audio source or mix are given, so the technical quality is assumed to be adequate for enjoyment.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one brief review with a perfect rating; strong positive sentiment but no concrete data on recording or performance quality, so the rating is based mainly on the high star count.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No specific comments about sound clarity, mix, or source type were provided.
